import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Package, TrendingUp, AlertCircle, DollarSign, PlusCircle, ShoppingCart, Users, Activity, Monitor, Smartphone, Volume2, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'; import { useInventory } from '../contexts/InventoryContext'; import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const Dashboard = () => { const { getStats, items } = useInventory(); const { currentUser } = useAuth(); const stats = getStats(); const recentItems = items.slice(0, 5); const lowStockItems = items.filter(item => item.quantity <= 5 && item.quantity > 0); const StatCard = ({ title, value, icon: Icon, color, trend }) => (

{title}

{value}

{trend && (

0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}> {trend > 0 ? '+' : ''}{trend}% from last month

)}
); return (

Dashboard

Welcome back, {currentUser?.name}! Here's your inventory overview.

{/* Stats Grid */}
{/* Alerts Section */} {stats.outOfStock > 0 && (

Low Stock Alert

{stats.outOfStock} item{stats.outOfStock > 1 ? 's' : ''} out of stock. {lowStockItems.length > 0 && ` ${lowStockItems.length} item${lowStockItems.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} running low.`}

)}
{/* Recent Items */}

Recent Items

View All
{recentItems.map((item) => (

{item.name}

{item.sku}

{item.quantity}

{item.availability ? 'Available' : 'Out of Stock'}

))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

Add New Item View Inventory {currentUser?.role === 'admin' && ( Manage Users )}
View Reports
{/* Categories Overview */}

Categories Overview

{[...new Set(items.map(item => item.category))].map((category) => { const categoryItems = items.filter(item => item.category === category); const categoryQuantity = categoryItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0); return (

{category}

{categoryItems.length} items • {categoryQuantity} units

); })}
); }; export default Dashboard;
